name: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva
title: President of Brazil

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Left-leaning Latin American solidarity and BRICS cooperation
BRICS partnership and trade diversification strategy
Occasional friction over Amazon policy and trade balances

biography: Lula da Silva returned to Brazil's presidency in 2023 after a dramatic political arc that included two previous terms, a corruption conviction, imprisonment, and judicial exoneration. A former metalworker and union leader, his ENFJ charisma fuels mass appeal among Brazil's working class. He pursues South-South diplomacy through BRICS, balances commodity-driven growth with social welfare expansion, and positions Brazil as a mediating voice in global conflicts while managing a deeply polarized domestic landscape.
